query:
ALTER TABLE ai_assessments 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS parts_cost INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS labor_cost INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS accident_type VARCHAR(50) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS structural_damage TINYINT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS airbag_deployment TINYINT DEFAULT 0;
